batches.description: Implement PRD v2 Milestones 2-5: Virtual FS, Agent Tools, UI Enhancements, Seed Data

tasks.title: Add VFS tables to Drizzle schema + migrate
tasks.description: Add projects, documents, todos, events tables with indexes and FTS to src/lib/db/schema.ts. Generate and apply migration.

tasks.title: Add VFS types to shared types
tasks.description: Add Project, Document, Todo, Event, SearchResult interfaces to src/types/index.ts

tasks.title: Install just-bash dependency
tasks.description: npm install just-bash for Virtual FS engine

tasks.title: Implement path-utils
tasks.description: Path normalization, dirname, basename, join utilities at src/lib/fs/path-utils.ts

tasks.title: Implement TreeBuilder
tasks.description: Directory tree bootstrapping from PostgreSQL at src/lib/fs/tree-builder.ts. Uses Drizzle to query documents table once, builds in-memory Map for ls/find/stat.

tasks.title: Implement GrepOptimizer
tasks.description: Coarse (PostgreSQL ILIKE) → cache → fine (regex) grep at src/lib/fs/grep-optimizer.ts

tasks.title: Implement VirtualFs (IFileSystem)
tasks.description: Full IFileSystem implementation backed by PostgreSQL at src/lib/fs/virtual-fs.ts. Composes TreeBuilder, CacheLayer, GrepOptimizer.

tasks.title: Implement agent tools
tasks.description: Create execute_command, create_task, update_task, create_event, search_docs tools at src/lib/agent/tools.ts using LangChain tool() format

tasks.title: Update system prompt for VFS
tasks.description: Rewrite system-prompt.ts with Virtual FS awareness, tool descriptions, and project context

tasks.title: Wire tools into DeepAgent
tasks.description: Update agent.ts to accept projectId, initialize VirtualFs, pass tools to createDeepAgent. Update /api/chat route to pass projectId.

tasks.title: Seed script for demo project
tasks.description: Create scripts/seed-project.ts that inserts a demo project with documents, todos, and events into PostgreSQL

tasks.title: Generate migration and verify build
tasks.description: Run drizzle-kit generate for new tables, then npx tsc --noEmit to verify compilation

tasks.title: Apply migration to local database
tasks.description: Run drizzle-kit migrate to apply the new tables to PostgreSQL
